lines.english: What did the man in this story do?
lines.chinese: 这个故事里的男人做了什么？
lines.raw: What did the man in this story do? | 这个故事里的男人做了什么？

lines.english: When a plane from London arrived at Sydney airport,
lines.chinese: 当一架从伦敦起飞的飞机抵达悉尼机场时，
lines.raw: When a plane from London arrived at Sydney airport, | 当一架从伦敦起飞的飞机抵达悉尼机场时，

lines.english: workers began to unload a number of wooden boxes which contained clothing.
lines.chinese: 工人们开始卸下一些装有衣服的木箱。
lines.raw: workers began to unload a number of wooden boxes which contained clothing. | 工人们开始卸下一些装有衣服的木箱。

lines.english: No one could account for the fact that one of the boxes was extremely heavy.
lines.chinese: 没有人能解释其中一个箱子异常沉重的原因。
lines.raw: No one could account for the fact that one of the boxes was extremely heavy. | 没有人能解释其中一个箱子异常沉重的原因。

lines.english: It suddenly occurred to one of the workers to open up the box.
lines.chinese: 其中一个工人突然想到要打开那个箱子。
lines.raw: It suddenly occurred to one of the workers to open up the box. | 其中一个工人突然想到要打开那个箱子。

lines.english: He was astonished at what he found.
lines.chinese: 他对自己的发现感到震惊。
lines.raw: He was astonished at what he found. | 他对自己的发现感到震惊。

lines.english: A man was lying in the box on top of a pile of woollen goods.
lines.chinese: 一个人躺在箱子里，在一堆羊毛制品上面。
lines.raw: A man was lying in the box on top of a pile of woollen goods. | 一个人躺在箱子里，在一堆羊毛制品上面。

lines.english: He was so surprised at being discovered that he did not even try to run away.
lines.chinese: 他被发现时非常惊讶，甚至没有试图逃跑。
lines.raw: He was so surprised at being discovered that he did not even try to run away. | 他被发现时非常惊讶，甚至没有试图逃跑。
After he was arrested, | 他被捕后，

lines.english: the man admitted hiding in the box before the plane left London.
lines.chinese: 这个人承认在飞机离开伦敦之前藏进了箱子里。
lines.raw: the man admitted hiding in the box before the plane left London. | 这个人承认在飞机离开伦敦之前藏进了箱子里。

lines.english: He had had a long and uncomfortable trip,
lines.chinese: 他经历了一次漫长而不舒服的旅行，
lines.raw: He had had a long and uncomfortable trip, | 他经历了一次漫长而不舒服的旅行，

lines.english: for he had been confined to the wooden box for over eighteen hours.
lines.chinese: 因为他被关在木箱里超过十八个小时。
lines.raw: for he had been confined to the wooden box for over eighteen hours. | 因为他被关在木箱里超过十八个小时。

lines.english: The man was ordered to pay ￡3, 500 for the cost of the trip.
lines.chinese: 这个人被勒令支付3,500英镑作为旅行费用。
lines.raw: The man was ordered to pay ￡3, 500 for the cost of the trip. | 这个人被勒令支付3,500英镑作为旅行费用。

lines.english: The normal price of a ticket is ￡2, 000!
lines.chinese: 一张机票的正常价格是2,000英镑！
lines.raw: The normal price of a ticket is ￡2, 000! | 一张机票的正常价格是2,000英镑！
